query: SELECT id, nickname, phone, createdAt FROM players WHERE nickname IN (SELECT nickname FROM players GROUP BY nickname HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY nickname, id LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2d1S7viP934C9u9.root --database f39rghmcCDkVuc3rBX8cym --execute SELECT id, nickname, phone, createdAt FROM players WHERE nickname IN (SELECT nickname FROM players GROUP BY nickname HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY nickname, id LIMIT 30;
